name: Labor | Admin | Site Walkthrough
notes: 2 hours fixed. On-site measurements, photos, scope documentation.

name: Labor | Admin | Project Management
notes: 4 hrs (2 on refresh). Material ordering, scheduling, coordination.

name: Other | Admin | Building Permit
notes: Fixed $350 cost / $500 price. Bozeman building permit for remodeling.

name: Labor | Demo | Floor Tile
notes: Demolition of floor tile finishes. Craftsman: 0.08 mh/SF (Sm crew). Refresh uses 0.5x.

name: Labor | Framing | General
notes: Studs/plates 16" oc, adjusted for remodel context. 0.05 mh/SF. Refresh: 4 hrs fixed.

name: Labor | Framing | Niche Blocking
notes: 2 hours per niche. Frame blocking for recessed shower niches.

name: Labor | Plumbing | Install Shower Trim
notes: Remove existing fixtures and replace each fixture with a new fixture: sink faucet, toilet supply, shower, tub.

name: Labor | Plumbing | Install Toilet
notes: Replace existing toilet with new toilet, includes all material needed.

name: Material | Plumbing | Vanity Faucet Assembly
notes: Faucet, P-trap, supply lines, angle stops. $85 cost.

name: Labor | Electrical | Exhaust Fan
notes: 3 hours fixed. Install exhaust fan, duct to exterior, wire to switch.

name: Material | Decking | Deck Board | Composite Mid
Material | Decking | Deck Board | Composite Premium

Material | Stairs | Tread Stock | Composite Premium
Material | Railing | Railing Package | Metal Cable
Labor | Tile | Floor Installation
notes: Production rate varies by tile_level: basic 0.20, mid 0.28, high 0.38 mh/SF.

notes:
2 Bags Sanded Base 10#
2 Tubes Silicone
1 Permacolor Color Kit

name: Labor | Drywall | Remove and Replace
notes: 0.05 mh/SF remodel context (up from 0.03 new-install). Includes removal.

notes: 2 hours fixed. Hang mirror, secure hardware.
